description_long: This object is a firearm with a classic design, featuring a long black metal barrel with circular vent holes along the upper section. The stock and foregrip are made of wood, giving it a traditional appearance, while the receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from dark metal. A prominent cylindrical drum magazine is mounted beneath the receiver, suggesting a high ammunition capacity. The trigger and trigger guard are clearly visible, with the guard being rounded and of moderate size. The overall build is robust, with a combination of wood and metal materials, and the object is designed for handheld use.
description: A traditional shotgun with a wooden stock, black metal barrel, and a large drum magazine beneath the receiver.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full wooden stock, black barrel with vent holes, and the drum magazine clearly visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the drum magazine's width beneath the receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, black barrel, and drum magazine from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and magazine.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vented upper section and medium length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
